name: Whole Wheat Hamburger Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the warm water, mild oil, sugar, and yeast in a large bowl. Mix thoroughly.
2. Allow the mixture to rest for 15 minutes.
3. Add the salt, egg yolk, whole wheat flour, and white flour to the yeast mixture. Mix until thoroughly combined (at least 10 minutes).
4. Place the dough on a floured surface and roll it out until it is about 3/4-inch thick.
5. Cut circles of dough that are approximately 4 inches in diameter using a cutter or a large empty can that has been washed out.
6. Transfer the buns to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Brush the tops of the buns with melted butter.
8. Allow the buns to rise for 30 minutes.
9. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
10. Bake the buns for 10 minutes or until they are golden brown.
YIELD: 10 buns
